Free Course

The Client Capture Crash Course

Six short lessons on exactly how the systems work that keep businesses from losing leads. The same workflows we build for clients, explained in plain language with diagrams.

Completely free. No email required. No signup wall.

The Lessons

Read them in order or jump to the one costing you the most money right now.

1

Missed Call Text-Back, Explained

What happens in the 60 seconds after a call you could not answer, and why it decides who gets the job.

Start lesson → 2

Speed to Lead: Why the First Response Wins

The research-backed reason the fastest responder wins most jobs, and how to be first every time without watching your phone.

Start lesson → 3

Follow-Up Sequences: Closing the Quotes You Already Sent

Most quotes die from silence, not rejection. The 2-7-14 day sequence that brings them back.

Start lesson → 4

The Review Engine: Stacking Stars on Google Automatically

Why the business with 150 reviews beats the better business with 8, and the simple system that closes that gap.

Start lesson → 5

Database Reactivation: The Money Sitting in Your Old Lead List

Every old quote, past customer, and dead lead in your records is someone you already paid to acquire. One text wakes them up.

Start lesson → 6

No-Show Recovery: Protecting the Appointments You Already Booked

A no-show is not a lost customer, it is a missed message. The 24-hour, 2-hour, and recovery text sequence explained.

Start lesson →

Rather Have It Built for You?

Everything in this course is what the Client Capture Engine does automatically. Get a free custom video breakdown of where it would catch leads in your business.
